output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Demand It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your rights and send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No signup needed.
content_outline: Why Your Landlord Is Withholding Your Deposit (And Why They're Probably Wrong)
What Landlords Can Legally Deduct From Your Security Deposit
State-by-State Deadlines: How Long Landlords Have to Return Your Money
The #1 Mistake Tenants Make When Fighting Back
How to Send a Professional Security Deposit Demand Letter in Under 60 Seconds
When to Escalate to Small Claims Court
key_points: Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14-30 days or provide an itemized deduction list
Normal wear and tear, cleaning, and routine repainting cannot be deducted from your security deposit
A formal demand letter is often legally required before filing in small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific demand letters for $19.99 with no account or subscription
Tenants who send certified demand letters recover deposits significantly faster than those who only text or email
output.cta: Stop waiting. Generate your official security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no signup, no subscription, no stress.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlord is wrongfully withholding, deducting from, or refusing to return their security deposit and need a fast, affordable legal solution.
